analysis_result: PTCH1 loss frequency in MPNST-G1 tumors: 3/8 (37.5%) using the specified +/-5 Mb window around PTCH1 TSS on chr9 with a log2-ratio loss threshold of < -0.1. Losses occurred in M2346 (log2r=-0.282), M2372 (-0.167) and M803 (-0.126); three additional samples (M2252 -0.094, M1014 -0.044, M6712 -0.036) showed smaller negative log2r's that did not cross the threshold, and two samples (M3048 +0.207, M3398 +0.017) had no evidence of loss. If the locus window is narrowed to the focal PTCH1 body (chr9:98.2-98.3 Mb, 81 probes), the frequency rises to 4/8 (50%, M2252 additionally crosses -0.1). Mean window log2r in MPNST-G1 (-0.066) is the most negative of the seven methylation classes; benign NF and sporadic spinal NF classes have 0% loss by this criterion.
denominator_used: N = 8 MPNST-G1 tumors from the clinical table (41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx, Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G1'): M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M3398, M6712, M803. All 8 had paired Grn/Red IDAT pairs in GSE207207_idats and were included.
assumptions_made: Used Python methylprep (v1.7.1) as a CONUMEE substitute since R/Bioconductor packages were not available; total CpG intensity computed as methylated + unmethylated sum across Infinium I (A+B same color) and II (A red + A green) probes; per-sample autosomal-median normalization followed by cohort-median pooled reference (no dedicated normal reference provided); log2-ratio loss threshold = -0.1 per question specification; PTCH1 TSS center set to chr9:98,250,000 hg19 (midpoint of the 98.2-98.3 Mb locus given in the prompt) with a +/-5 Mb probe window yielding 3139 EPIC probes; per-sample locus log2r = simple mean of the 3139 probe log2 ratios; no segmentation/smoothing performed (CONUMEE normally does this but the question specifies probe-level log2r averaging); loss call is based on aggregate window mean, not on the fraction of probes below threshold.
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - Clinical table: /data/41467_2023_38432_MOESM4_ESM.xlsx (108 rows, 15 cols). Columns used: Tumor_ID, Methylation_Group, Sentrix_ID.
   - EPIC manifest: GSE207207_idats/GPL21145_MethylationEPIC_15073387_v-1-0.csv.gz (867,926 assay probes). Columns used: IlmnID, AddressA_ID, AddressB_ID, Infinium_Design_Type, Color_Channel, CHR, MAPINFO.
   - IDAT files: 108 Grn + 108 Red pairs parsed by methylprep.files.IdatDataset.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter 1: Methylation_Group == 'MPNST_G1' in clinical table -> 8 tumors.
   - Filter 2: Both Grn and Red IDAT pairs present for Sentrix_ID -> 8 tumors retained.
   - Final analytic cohort: 8 MPNST_G1 tumors (M1014, M2252, M2346, M2372, M3048, M3398, M6712, M803).

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Exposure: MPNST_G1 membership (categorical from Methylation_Group).
   - Outcome: PTCH1 locus loss (binary). Computed from log2-ratio copy-number signal over probes in chr9:93,250,000-103,250,000 (hg19), the +/-5 Mb window around PTCH1 TSS (98,250,000) specified by the prompt. Loss call: sample's mean window log2r < -0.1.
   - Reference: within-cohort median of normalized intensities across all 108 samples (pooled reference since no dedicated normal was available).

D. COMPUTATION
   - Per sample, for each CpG: total intensity = meth + unmeth signal (Infinium I: Addr_A + Addr_B in the probe's color; Infinium II: Addr_A Red + Addr_A Grn).
   - log2 transformed; per-sample autosomal median (chr1-22 probes only) subtracted.
   - Probe-wise cohort median subtracted -> probe x sample log2-ratio matrix (shape 867,926 x 108).
   - 3,139 EPIC probes fell within chr9:93.25-103.25 Mb (the +/-5 Mb window); 81 probes fell within the focal 98.2-98.3 Mb locus.
   - Per-sample window log2r = simple mean across those 3,139 probes.
   - Per-sample focal log2r = simple mean across those 81 probes.
   - Threshold: loss if window log2r < -0.1.

   Per-sample results (window log2r, focal log2r, loss call):
     M1014 (-0.044, -0.016): no loss
     M2252 (-0.094, -0.124): no loss at window, loss at focal
     M2346 (-0.282, -0.259): LOSS
     M2372 (-0.167, -0.187): LOSS
     M3048 (+0.207, +0.216): gain-direction, no loss
     M3398 (+0.017, +0.105): no loss
     M6712 (-0.036, -0.081): no loss
     M803  (-0.126, -0.148): LOSS

   Cross-group comparison (mean window log2r / % loss at threshold):
     MPNST_G1:            -0.066 / 3/8 = 37.5% (most negative class)
     MPNST_G2:            -0.020 / 1/8 = 12.5%
     PremalignantNF_G3:   -0.007 / 1/29 = 3.4%
     Benign_NF-G4:        +0.007 / 0/20 = 0.0%
     Sporadic Spinal NF_G5: -0.001 / 0/10 = 0.0%
     Cutaneous NF_G6:     -0.031 / 1/12 = 8.3%
     Cutaneous NF_G7:     -0.028 / 1/21 = 4.8%

E. RESULT
   - Primary answer (+/-5 Mb window, log2r < -0.1): 3/8 (37.5%).
   - Secondary (focal 98.2-98.3 Mb only): 4/8 (50%).
   - MPNST_G1 is enriched for PTCH1-region loss relative to all other methylation classes in this cohort.

F. CAVEATS
   - CONUMEE normally uses a panel of healthy controls as a reference; here no normal reference was provided, so the cohort median was used. This compresses signal when losses are shared across many samples (e.g., if all MPNST carry the same loss, the baseline shifts and event rate would be under-estimated).
   - No segmentation/smoothing performed; result is a simple locus-mean of probe log2 ratios rather than a full circular-binary-segmented CONUMEE call. This is consistent with the prompt's instruction to 'use Python methylprep log2-ratio substitute' and 'include any probe within +/-5Mb of PTCH1 TSS'.
   - Loss threshold of -0.1 is quite liberal (standard CONUMEE loss thresholds are typically -0.15 to -0.3); with threshold -0.15 two MPNST_G1 samples remain clearly lost (2/8 = 25%).
   - N=8 is small; 95% Wilson CI for 3/8 is approximately 14%-69%, so the proportion is uncertain.
   - PTCH1 TSS placement at chr9:98,250,000 is an approximation of the midpoint of the range given in the prompt; gene-body coordinates are chr9:98,205,264-98,279,339 (hg19). Changing the center by ~50 kb does not change the window (5 Mb is far larger than the gene).
   - Sample-level normalization used autosomal probe median which can mask truly broad aneuploidy; but for a 10 Mb locus this should not affect the result materially.
   - No batch adjustment for Sentrix chip was performed.
